zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Stewart於1308年出生在蘇格蘭費伏薩林時，她的父親Sir Alexander Stewart37歲，母親Jean FitzJames38歲。她於大約1320年與Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1347年1月17日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年39歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Stewart于1308年出生在苏格兰費伏薩林时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Stewart37岁，母亲Jean FitzJames38岁。她于大约1320年与Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1347年1月17日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年39岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Stewart was born in 1308, in Saline, Fife, Scotland, her father, Sir Alexander Stewart, was 37 and her mother, Jean FitzJames, was 38. She married Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar about 1320, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 17 January 1347, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Stewart est née en 1308, à Saline, Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Stewart, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Jean FitzJames, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar environ 1320, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 janvier 1347, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Stewart 1308 in Saline, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Stewart 37 und ihre Mutter Jean FitzJames 38. Sie hat um 1320 in Scotland Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Januar 1347 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Stewart è nata il nel 1308 nel Saline, Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alexander Stewart, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Jean FitzJames, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar circa 1320, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 gennaio 1347, nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Stewartが1308年にスコットランドフィフサラインで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Stewartは37歳，母Jean FitzJamesは38歳であった。約1320年にスコットランドでDonald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Marと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1347年1月17日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーで39歳で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Stewart(이)가 1308년 스컷랜드 피프 살라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Stewart(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jean FitzJames(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1320년 스컷랜드에서 Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1347년 1월 17일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Stewart nasceu em 1308, em Saline, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Stewart, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Jean FitzJames, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar aproximadamente 1320, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1347, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Stewart родилась в 1308 г. в местности салаин, фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Stewart было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Jean FitzJames, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar около 1320 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 января 1347 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Stewart nació en 1308, en Saline, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander Stewart, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Jean FitzJames, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Donald MacGylocher 8th Earl of Mar aproximadamente 1320, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de enero de 1347, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.
